name: Pasta with Asparagus Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 lb asparagus, blanched and cut into 1-inch pieces
1/2 cup ham, sliced into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Cook garlic for 1 minute until fragrant.
3. Add asparagus and cook for another 5 minutes until tender.
4. Add pasta to the skillet and cook according to package instructions until al dente. Drain well.
5. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
6. In a large bowl, combine cooked pasta, olive oil mixture (including garlic), tuna, ham, olives, lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
7. Toss ingredients together well to ensure even distribution of flavors.
8. Serve at room temperature or refrigerate until cold if desired before serving.
